since_last: 36% of 87 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.94%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 36% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.01% · BTC -2.45% · Gold +1.35% · Nasdaq100 +0.75%. 36% of 87 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.94%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.94%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.42%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +16.15%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +16.15%, AMAT +13.47%, TER +11.23%, KLAC +8.05%, LRCX +7.17%. Laggards: INOD -10.61%, AAPL -6.17%, DELL -5.81%, AI -5.69%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.84% at $153.24
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.84% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
